Package de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.plugins.caching

Class CachedProofBranch

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.plugins.caching.CachedProofBranch
public class CachedProofBranch extends Object
Data object about a cached proof branch. (see CachingDatabase)
